name: Kireeti Piratla
text:
Lazy evening, doomscrolling Reddit (as one does)… and boom — drift fix post. I was mentally prepared to sacrifice ₹2k to the repair gods, but this guy Rana is like “nah bro, 1/3rd price” and he’s 15 mins away. Red flags? Green flags? Idk, I went.
Met him — instant vibe check passed. Man’s a gamer. And only a gamer knows the pure psychological warfare that is stick drift.
Handed over both controllers, already calculating financial damage. He calls back and goes, “Only one needs fixing.”
Brother.
WHAT??
In this economy??
Unprovoked honesty??
No upsell?? No scam??
I was not prepared.
Any corporate repair dungeon would’ve fixed both, billed me, and sent me home emotionally poorer. Not Rana. This man chose integrity over profit. In 2026. Wild.
Technician ❌
Small business ❌
Repair guy ❌
Rana is a patch update sent directly by the gaming gods.
If your controller is drifting, don’t think. Don’t research. Don’t compare.
Just go.
Endgame solution unlocked 🎮
address: Allind emp colony, Plot 84, Sudarshan Nagar Colony, Serilingampalle (M), Hyderabad, Telangana 500019, India
title: Hyderabad Gaming Garage
